Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Response To Form Interrogatory 2.5 And For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Oct-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

Richard Hurlbert, for Plaintiffs and Moving Parties Min Luong, and Hien Nguyen

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Min Luong and Hien Nguyen's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is granted. Counsel for plaintiff may not disclose or permit to be disclosed to plaintiff, members of the plaintiff's family, or anyone else, the address or telephone number of defendant unless specifically permitted to do so by the court after a hearing and a showing of good cause. Notwithstanding the above, counsel for plaintiff may disclose or permit to be disclosed the address or telephone number to persons employed by counsel to assist in the preparation of the case, if that disclosure is required for that preparation. Persons provided this information by counsel shall be informed that further dissemination of the information constitutes a violation of a court order. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Order signed. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
